UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, EDWARD SHERMAN NG, MABEL LAU, KI NG, DAVID NORMAN LIANG, TAMARA HOPE NG, ADAM SHERWIN NG, STEPHEN LOUIS, DORIS NG, PHINEAS JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMANCUSA, PHILIPE ROSSELOT, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 PRESIDIO AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522. INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
